audit_methods: Pattern checks for semantic HTML, keyboard traps, labels, reflow, motion, AEO structure, and site-level agent-readiness files when a directory is scanned
Runtime behavior, contrast ratios, and screen-reader task completion were not fully verified

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Page language is missing
findings.description: The HTML page does not declare a lang attribute, so assistive technology may choose the wrong pronunciation rules.
findings.fix: Add a language attribute such as <html lang="zh-Hant"> or the correct document language.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Document title is missing
findings.affected_users: Screen-reader users, keyboard users, and users with many tabs open
findings.description: A missing or empty title makes the page difficult to identify in browser and assistive technology contexts.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Main landmark is not statically visible
findings.affected_users: Screen-reader and keyboard users navigating by landmarks
findings.description: No <main> or role="main" was found in this static file.
findings.fix: Wrap primary page content in <main id="main-content">.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Heading level is skipped
findings.description: Heading jumps from level 1 to level 4.
findings.fix: Use a continuous heading hierarchy or adjust the visual style without changing semantic level.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Image is missing alt text
findings.affected_users: Blind and low-vision users using screen readers
findings.description: An image without alt text is silent or announced poorly by assistive technology.
findings.fix: Add meaningful alt text, or alt="" for purely decorative images.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Image is missing alt text
findings.affected_users: Blind and low-vision users using screen readers
findings.description: An image without alt text is silent or announced poorly by assistive technology.
findings.fix: Add meaningful alt text, or alt="" for purely decorative images.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Frame is missing a title
findings.description: An <iframe> without a title gives screen-reader users no way to know what the frame contains before entering it.
findings.fix: Add title="..." describing the frame content.
findings.code_before: not a list item

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: List contains a non-list-item child
findings.affected_users: Screen-reader users navigating by list semantics
findings.description: A <ul>/<ol> has a direct child that is not <li>, <script>, or <template> (found <div>). Screen readers may not announce the list or its item count correctly.
findings.fix: Make <li> the only structural child; move wrapper elements inside an <li>, or use role="list"/role="listitem" if a non-standard structure is unavoidable.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Button may not have an accessible name
findings.description: A button with no visible text or accessible label is hard to understand or activate by name.
findings.fix: Add visible text, aria-label, or aria-labelledby.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Link may not have an accessible name
findings.description: A link with no visible text, no aria-label/aria-labelledby/title (on it or a descendant), and no image alt or SVG title has no accessible name. Screen readers announce it as a bare "link".
findings.fix: Add visible link text, an aria-label/aria-labelledby/title, give a wrapped meaningful alt text, or add an

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Link may not have an accessible name
findings.description: A link with no visible text, no aria-label/aria-labelledby/title (on it or a descendant), and no image alt or SVG title has no accessible name. Screen readers announce it as a bare "link".
findings.fix: Add visible link text, an aria-label/aria-labelledby/title, give a wrapped meaningful alt text, or add an

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Clickable non-button element
findings.affected_users: Keyboard-only, switch-control, screen-reader, and voice-control users
findings.description: Clickable <div> or <span> elements are not keyboard-operable by default.
findings.fix: Use <button> for actions. If custom semantics are unavoidable, add role, tabindex, and Enter/Space handling.
findings.code_before:
not a list item
Go

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Input may be missing an accessible label
findings.affected_users: Screen-reader, voice-control, and cognitive disability users
findings.description: The input has no obvious id or ARIA label in static markup.
findings.fix: Pair it with a <label for="..."> or use aria-labelledby when a visible label already exists.

findings.legal_exposure: May affect ADA / EAA / JIS / Taiwan accessibility expectations depending on deployment context.
findings.title: Viewport meta disables zoom
findings.affected_users: Low-vision users who pinch-zoom, and mobile users
findings.description: The viewport meta tag prevents zoom (user-scalable=no), so users cannot enlarge text.
findings.fix: Remove user-scalable=no and any maximum-scale below 5; use content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1".
findings.code_before:
<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title></title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no">
</head><body><div id="content">

findings.legal_exposure: Not a legal issue; affects search / answer-engine clarity.
findings.title: Meta description is missing
findings.affected_users: Search and answer-engine users evaluating whether to open the result
findings.description: No meta description was found in the static HTML.
findings.fix: Add a concise page-specific meta description.

findings.legal_exposure: Not a legal issue; affects search / answer-engine clarity.
findings.title: Canonical link is missing
findings.affected_users: Search and answer-engine users when duplicate URLs or variants exist
findings.description: No canonical URL was found in the static HTML, so crawlers may have to infer the preferred URL.
findings.fix: Add <link rel="canonical" href="https://example.com/preferred-url"> for indexable public pages.

findings.legal_exposure: Not a legal issue; affects answer-engine and search clarity.
findings.title: JSON-LD structured data is missing
findings.affected_users: Search and answer-engine users trying to identify the page entity and content type
findings.description: No JSON-LD structured data was found in the static HTML.
findings.fix: Add page-appropriate Schema.org JSON-LD, such as Organization, Article, FAQPage, Product, BreadcrumbList, or WebSite.

legal_risk.narrative: Technical WCAG criteria mapping only. This is not a legal opinion and is not derived from warning counts.

jurisdictions.name: US ADA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; legal exposure depends on business model, sector, and jurisdiction-specific facts.

jurisdictions.name: EU EAA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence for consumer digital-service accessibility planning.

jurisdictions.name: Japan JIS
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; confirm procurement or sector requirements separately.

jurisdictions.name: Taiwan
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence only; confirm current local program, certification, and seal requirements before making a compliance claim.

jurisdictions.name: Canada ACA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; applicability depends on organization type and regulated context.

jurisdictions.name: Australia DDA
jurisdictions.detail: Use the mapped WCAG criteria as technical evidence; legal assessment requires local context and counsel.

testing_recommendations.zh: 修復鍵盤發現項後，僅使用 Tab、Shift+Tab、Enter、Space 與方向鍵重跑主要流程。
testing_recommendations.en: After fixing the keyboard findings, rerun the primary flow using only Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, and arrow keys.

testing_recommendations.zh: 修復表單發現項後，驗證 label、必填狀態與錯誤訊息能被鍵盤及螢幕閱讀器正確使用。
testing_recommendations.en: After fixing the form findings, verify labels, required states, and error messages with both keyboard and screen reader.

testing_recommendations.zh: 修復語意結構發現項後，用 NVDA 或 VoiceOver 完成主要任務。
testing_recommendations.en: After fixing the semantic findings, complete the primary task with NVDA or VoiceOver.

testing_recommendations.zh: 用真實瀏覽器搭配 axe-core 驗證計算後的文字與 UI 對比。
testing_recommendations.en: Verify computed text and UI contrast in a real browser with axe-core.

testing_recommendations.zh: 在 200% 縮放下重跑主要流程；320px 回流結果已由本次掃描另行記錄。
testing_recommendations.en: Rerun the primary flow at 200% zoom; the 320px reflow result is recorded separately by this audit.

testing_recommendations.zh: 請一位不熟悉產品的使用者完成主要任務，觀察標籤、說明與下一步是否清楚。
testing_recommendations.en: Ask a user unfamiliar with the product to complete the primary task and observe whether labels, help, and next steps are clear.
